title: Super Bheem
subTitle: 1.Rangeeli and Chamkeela pilfer toys from Sky Dragon's vault using a portal gun. They get back to their planet leaving the gun behind. 2.The gang is having fun near a lake when a monster chases them.Bheem fights the monster.

title: Super Bheem
subTitle: The gang enters an old Pyramid to come across a wizard, Humba, who attacked them and ate Bheem's laddoo making him weak. Bheem gets one laddo left in Chutki's bag which he ate to finally defeat Humba.
